ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Place of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Shooting hand of the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college attended by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team of the player */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the player */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Current salary of the player */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft pick */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the player's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the college's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was drafted */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" TEXT /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round number in the draft */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_position" TEXT /* Position the player was drafted to play */,
  "draft_type" TEXT /* Type of draft (e.g., first round, second round, international) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the draft pick's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Current coach of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the team's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season was played */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists in the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals in the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks in the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "field_goal_percentage" TEXT /* Field goal percentage for the season */,
  "three_point_percentage" TEXT /* Three-point percentage for the season */,
  "free_throw_percentage" TEXT /* Free throw percentage for the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers in the season */,
  "efficiency" TEXT /* Player's efficiency rating for the season */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the season's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "award_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the award */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the award's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
